company_name_local: 通富微电子股份有限公司

business_segments.name: IC Packaging & Testing
business_segments.description: Traditional and advanced IC packaging and testing services

business_segments.name: Advanced Packaging
business_segments.description: Flip Chip, BGA, FC-BGA, SiP, 2.5D/3D packaging

abf_ic_substrate_activity.abf_usage: Tongfu uses ABF substrates for FC-BGA packaging of high-performance computing chips. Major customer is AMD for EPYC server processors and Instinct AI accelerators.
abf_ic_substrate_activity.cowos_details: Tongfu offers FC-BGA packaging which is an alternative to CoWoS for some applications, but is not a direct CoWoS competitor.

osat_activity.capacity_expansion: Expanding Nantong and Suzhou facilities for advanced packaging
osat_activity.amd_partnership: Tongfu is AMD's primary OSAT partner in China, handling packaging for EPYC and Instinct products

strengths: Strong AMD partnership for advanced packaging
weaknesses: Technology gap vs ASE/Amkor in cutting-edge packaging
Lower margins than global OSAT leaders
opportunities: AI chip packaging demand from Chinese customers
Potential to capture US-China trade diversion orders
threats: US export controls on advanced packaging equipment

abf_relevance.notes: High ABF relevance - FC-BGA packaging for HPC, AMD partner

data_completeness.notes: Limited financial data, missing quarterly breakdowns

source_quality.notes: T3 - training knowledge only, company website blocked

swot_quality.notes: Good SWOT, could have more specific data

market_position.notes: Clear position as China #1 OSAT but missing competitive details

review.decision_reason: Score 63 >= 60 threshold. Tongfu is an important OSAT player for ABF substrate packaging but data quality needs improvement.
